title: Bovark clan
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Bovark''' or '''Borvak clan''' was a [[Nimbanel/Legends|Nimbanese]] clan, and one of the prime data holders for the [[Bureau of Ships and Services/Legends|Bureau of Ships and Services]] (or BoSS) several centuries [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]].<ref name="Cracken's Rebel Field Guide">[[Cracken's Rebel Field Guide (sourcebook)|''Cracken's Rebel Field Guide'']]</ref> [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Mingo Bovark]] was likely a clan member.<ref name="Star Wars: Legacy 9">[[Legacy (2006) 9|''Legacy'' (2006) 9]]</ref>

Unfortunately for the Bovarks, they considered bureaucracy to be a competitive endeavor. This competitiveness was in keeping with Nimbanese culture, but the Bovarks combined this with aggressive tendencies which were atypical for Nimbanels. This led to conflict with other BoSS data holders, such as the Nimbanese [[Krovalis clan]].<ref name="Galaxy Guide 12">''[[Galaxy Guide 12: Aliens — Enemies and Allies]]''</ref>

The Bovarks eventually went too far, actually threatening another BoSS clan with violence. BoSS responded to this crisis by threatening to delete the files for every [[Starship/Legends|starship]] in existence unless the Bovarks were forced to stop their aggression. Faced with the possible shutdown of [[Galactic economy|interstellar trade]], a coalition of planetary governments sent a fleet of over one thousand warships to the [[Nimban system/Legends|Nimban system]]. The Bovarks were forced to back down.<ref name="Cracken's Rebel Field Guide" />

All other Nimbanese clans who were data holders lost their positions after the crisis was over—a severe blow to the Nimbanels. The Krovalis clan re-applied for a share, and succeeded with the support of the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutts]].<ref name="Galaxy Guide 12" />

==Behind the scenes==
While ''[[Cracken's Field Guide]]'' spells the clan name Borvak, [[Galaxy Guide 12: Aliens — Enemies and Allies|''Galaxy Guide 12'']] spells the name Bovark. It is possible that the two books actually refer to two different clans.
